notes: Items & Hidden Spots pins (deck slot 4) on the Ruins Of Alph Kabuto Item Room map, scoped to pokemon-crystal:ruins-of-alph. 4 item/gift pins from the data-layer map-pins dataset (AP-tracker checks), filtered to items+gifts (trainers/badges/signs/events/Pokémon excluded). Pixel coords converted to [0,1] fractions using the PNG (128x160). Per-check pins: checks sharing a spot stack at identical coordinates.
Pin labels use the check name, falling back to the source ref tail where the AP section name was blank.
